title: Rescue on Kessel
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Kessel}} {{Mission |prev=[[Assault on Kile II]][[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] |conc= |next=*[[Battle above Taloraan]] *[[Escape from Fest]] |image=[[File:Armored_hovertrain_Kessel_RS.png]] |name=Rescue on Kessel |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |objective=*Rescue [[Wedge Antilles]] from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] custody {{C|Primary}} *Help [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] free other rebels from Kessel {{C|Secondary}} |date=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] |place=[[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] |result=*Decisive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] victory **Wedge Antilles is successfully rescued *Liberation of many political prisoners and POWs |side1=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side2=Galactic Empire |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[General/Legends|General]] Crix Madine |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] **20 Rebel [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] *1 [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] *[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] **7 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *Kessel inmates |ppl2=*35 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *16 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *3 [[Armed transport]]s *21 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *16 [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] *23 [[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolasers]] *[[Armored hovertrain]] *7 [[Missile turret]]s |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=Unknown |casual2=*Heavy *Prison camps liberated *Armored hovertrain disabled and captured |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Kessel. It's a mining colony but the Imperials often keep political prisoners here too.|Kasan Moor on Kessel|}} The '''Rescue on Kessel''' was an operation that took place around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. During the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion's]] [[Assault on Kile II|assault]] on [[Kile II]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] starfighter had been disabled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. Antilles was smuggled into an evacuation shuttle and shipped to the prisons of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] commander [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] led a raid on the prisons using modified [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] starfighters, equipped with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]. He and Rogue Squadron disabled the [[Armored hovertrain]] carrying Wedge using their ion cannons. Soon after the rescue of Antilles, Rogue group returned with a commando team commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] and freed the remaining prisoners using Wedge's knowledge of the prison. They disabled the shield generator protecting the prison centers, evacuated the Rebel prisoners, and proceeded to rendezvous with the Rebel fleet. ==Prelude== Following the [[Liberation of Gerrard V|defection]] of [[Kasan Moor]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commander of the [[128th TIE Interceptor Squadron]], to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the Alliance used her knowledge of Imperial bases and operations to their advantage, and won a string of battles striking against Imperial installations. During an [[Assault on Kile II|assault]] on the Imperial spaceport in the canyons of [[Kile II]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], of the elite Alliance starfighter unit [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], was shot down by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, and was taken as a prisoner of war. Antilles was scheduled to be transferred to the prisons on the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] planet [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. Rogue Squadron, under the command of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], refused to let this happen, and a rescue operation was initiated to safely extract Antilles from the [[Armored hovertrain|hovertrain]] transferring him and other prisoners to the main prison facility. ==The rescue== ===Rescue of Wedge Antilles=== {{Quote|There it is. Rogue group, use your ion cannons. We want to disable this train, not destroy it.|Luke Skywalker|}} Using modified [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] equipped with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], which shuts down the electric systems of whatever it impacts, Rogue Squadron deployed to disable the hovertrain carrying Wedge Antilles and other prisoners. The Imperials attempted to use a secondary convoy to mislead Rogue group's on-board lifesign scanners. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)}} [[File:Rescue_on_Kessel.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Rebel evacuation group.]] [[Kasan Moor]], Rogue group member and a former Imperial pilot, recognized this tactic and persuaded Rogue group to ignore it. Skywalker destroyed the convoy before moving onto the hover train carrying the prisoners. [[Zev Senesca/Legends|Zev Senesca's]] long range scan confirmed Antilles to be on the train, and a barrage of ion cannon fire caused the train's systems to shut down, allowing Antilles and the train's passengers safe passage to escape. ===Extraction of other prisoners=== {{Quote|Thanks again, Rogues. I thought I was done for. Listen, while I was on that train, I found out that there are other rebels at the main prison facility. Crix Madine and his commandos will follow us in and get them out.|Wedge Antilles|}} [[File:Rescue_on_Kessel_2.jpg|thumb|left|220px|The Imperial prison.]] Based on advice given to him by Antilles, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] organized an operation to free other Rebel prisoners of war held on the planet. The prison camp Antilles was to be taken to, situated in a series of canyons, had three main facilities protected by a main [[DSS-02 shield generator/Legends|DSS-02]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]], [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], and a [[missile turret]]. The battle plan called for Rogue Squadron to knock out the main power generator, allowing Madine to deploy his commandos via a [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|landing craft]] into the prison facilities and free the prisoners. Skywalker and the Rogues protected the transport while it traveled to each of the three facilities and disembarked the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] to free the prisoners. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)}} While liberating the second facility, Rogue Squadron, after making sure any threats to the escape transport were neutralized, proceeded to destroy a bunker nearby, retrieving [[advanced seeker missile]]s in the process. {{Endgame}} ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Good Work, Rogues. General Madine, we'll buy your boys a round when we get back to the fleet.''"
"''You're on, Commander Skywalker. Good luck!|Luke Skywalker and Crix Madine|}} The rescue mission succeeded, and the Rogues and the transport returned to the fleet. ==Behind the scenes== The Rescue on Kessel appears in two consecutive missions in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]. It was also mentioned in the game's [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide|strategy guide]], [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 12|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 12]], and Wedge Antilles' entry in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''. During the first mission, there is a secondary convoy which the player may ignore or destroy. This article assumes the Rogues skipped it and went to the hovertrain. It takes 129 enemy forces destroyed to win a gold medal. The player can optionally retrieve the advanced seeker missile tech upgrade. The guide likewise suggests doing so in order to ensure a Gold Medal win. This article assumes the player did so. The guide suggests the [[V-wing airspeeder]] would be necessary to win a gold medal in the mission. However, the article assumes the player did not use a V-wing due to it not being developed yet at the time of the mission. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|12|Welcome On Board}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW_1_ABY}} {{Interlang |de=Scharmützel von Kessel (0 NSY) |es=Rescate en Kessel }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kessel, Rescue on}} [[Category:Battles of Kessel]] [[Category:Missions of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Rescue missions]]
